data.description: Ryanair Chief Michael O'Leary Plans To Hand Over To ‘Nicer’ Successor By 2035 - FT
US bank deposits fell to $18.479 trln from $18.528 trln in the prior week.

data.title: Shareholders approve STEP Energy Services Ltd.'s arrangement involving ARC Energy Fund 8 with overwhelming majority.
data.description: In Calgary, Alberta, STEP Energy Services Ltd. shared that shareholders have approved an arrangement at a special meeting. The arrangement involves ARC Energy Fund 8 Canadian Limited Partnership, ARC Energy Fund 8 United States Limited Partnership, ARC Energy Fund 8 International Limited Partnership, and ARC Capital 8 Limited Partnership. The meeting successfully concluded with shareholders consenting to the arrangement. The news comes after the meeting held today and marks a significant development for STEP Energy Services Ltd.

data.title: Starwood Property Trust declares $0.48 dividend per share for Q4 2025. Payable date not specified.
data.description: In Miami Beach, Florida on December 12, 2025, Starwood Property Trust, Inc. (NYSE: STWD) disclosed a quarterly dividend of $0.48 per share of common stock for the period ending December 31, 2025. The announcement was made by the Company's Board of Directors. This dividend will be distributed to shareholders and is part of the company's ongoing financial strategy.

data.title: ABRDN Global Income Fund (FCO) sets record date for shareholders to vote on merger with ABRDN Asia-Pacific Income Fund (FAX).
data.description: On December 12, 2025, abrdn Global Income Fund, Inc. (NYSE American: FCO) disclosed the record date for its upcoming shareholder meeting regarding the proposed reorganization into abrdn Asia-Pacific Income Fund, Inc. (NYSE American: FAX). The reorganization aims to transition FCO into FAX. This move signifies a strategic shift towards a focus on the Asia-Pacific region. Shareholders are encouraged to participate in the meeting to vote on this transition.

data.title: First Horizon Corp (NYSE:FHN) to announce Q4 & full-year financial results on Jan 15, 2026, at 6:30 am ET. Materials at ir.firsthorizon.com.
data.description: On December 12, 2025, in Memphis, Tennessee, First Horizon Corporation (NYSE:FHN) revealed its intention to disclose its financial performance for the fourth quarter and full year on January 15, 2026. Stakeholders can find the news release and additional materials at ir.firsthorizon.com around 6:30 am ET/5:30 am.

data.title: TSA introduces new labor framework on Jan. 11, 2026 - aims to cut waste, save time, and improve focus of employees.
data.description: A revised strategy introduced by the Transportation Security Administration (TSA) in Washington on December 12, 2025, is set to transform operations. This novel approach is expected to reduce wastage significantly, streamline processes to save essential time, and realign staff efforts. The TSA revealed plans to roll out the updated labor structure from January 11, 2026, effectively replacing the Collective Bargaining Agreement of 2024. This shift aims to enhance efficiency and productivity within the organization.

data.title: indie Semiconductor grants equity awards to new employees under 2023 Inducement Incentive Plan. Nasdaq: INDI.
data.description: Indie Semiconductor, a leader in automotive solutions based in Aliso Viejo, California, has disclosed the issuance of equity awards, known as the “Inducement Grants,” to new employees joining the company. These grants were approved by the Compensation Committee of indie Semiconductor’s Board of Directors, under its 2023 Inducement Incentive Plan. Details about these equity awards are available on the company's investor relations webpage. The company’s stock is listed on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol INDI.

data.title: UNC School of Ed revives B.A.Ed in Elementary Ed program. Approved by UNC Provost's office & College of Ed. Relaunched in 2025.
data.description: In Chapel Hill, North Carolina, on December 12, 2025, the University of North Carolina at Chapel Hill School of Education announced the revival of the Bachelor of Arts in Education (B.A.Ed.) program focusing on Elementary Education. The program has received approval from the UNC provost's office and the UNC College of Education. This initiative comes as a response to the growing demand for qualified elementary school teachers.

data.title: Edesa Biotech reported $7.2 million net loss for 2025, with $10.4 million in working capital. Plans for Phase 2 study.
data.description: Edesa Biotech, Inc. reported its financial results for the fiscal year ending September 30, 2025. The company initiated manufacturing activities for a Phase 2 study on EB06, a dermatology drug candidate for vitiligo. Its respiratory program showed positive results in a Phase 3 study of paridiprubart (EB05). Total operating expenses increased to $7.9 million compared to $7.0 million in the prior year. The company reported a net loss of $7.2 million for 2025. Edesa had cash and cash equivalents of $10.8 million and working capital of $10.4 million as of September 30, 2025. They received $3.4 million from a share offering after the fiscal year end. Key priorities include executing the Phase 2 vitiligo study and advancing respiratory assets. The company plans to participate in JP Morgan week starting January 12, 2026. Edesa Biotech is focusing on developing therapies for immuno-inflammatory diseases, specifically in Medical Dermatology and Respiratory areas. The company is seeking non-dilutive funding, partnership opportunities, and regulatory approvals.

data.title: Marvell Technology, Inc. declares $0.06 quarterly dividend per share. Payable on Jan 29, 2026 to shareholders of record on Jan 9, 2026.
data.description: Marvell Technology, Inc. (NASDAQ: MRVL) based in Santa Clara, California, has declared a quarterly dividend of $0.06 per common stock share. The dividend is set to be paid on January 29, 2026, to shareholders holding shares as of January 9, 2026. With a strong presence in the technology sector for more than 30 years, Marvell focuses on providing data infrastructure solutions through collaborations with its customers. Their partnerships enable them to connect the world by facilitating the movement, storage, and processing of data, making them a trusted choice for major technology firms globally.

data.title: System1 (NYSE: SST) notified for non-compliance with NYSE rules due to market cap < $50M and stockholder's equity < $50M. 18 months to cure.
data.description: System1, Inc. (NYSE: SST) disclosed that it received a notification from the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) indicating non-compliance with Section 802.01B of the NYSE Listed Company Manual. This was due to the company's 30 trading-day average market capitalization falling below $50 million, along with the stockholder's equity as of September 30, 2025, being less than $50 million. The company now has 18 months to rectify the market cap deficiency.
Parks! America, Inc. unveils Q4 and FY2025 financial performance with strong numbers.

data.title: FireFly submits final prospectus for Canadian bought deal offering, available on SEDAR+.
data.description: FireFly has completed the final short form prospectus for a Canadian bought deal offering. The document is now available on SEDAR+.

data.title: Alpha Metallurgical Resources issues 2026 guidance: expects to ship 15.1-16.5 million tons, aim for $95-$101 per ton cost.
data.description: Alpha Metallurgical Resources, Inc. has issued guidance expectations for the 2026 calendar year, focusing on safe production, efficiency, and investing in completing the Kingston Wildcat low vol mine. Sales volumes are projected to be between 15.1-16.5 million tons, with cost of coal sales between $95-$101 per ton. SG&A costs are estimated to be $53-$59 million, idle operations expense at $24-$32 million, net cash interest income at $2-$6 million, and depreciation, depletion, and amortization at $160-$174 million. Capital expenditures are projected to be $148-$168 million, with contributions to equity affiliates at $35-$45 million. The cash tax rate for 2026 is anticipated to be between 0-5%.

data.title: TELA Bio granted 3,600 restricted stock units to 3 new employees on Dec 9, 2025, as inducements for joining the company.
data.description: On December 12, 2025, TELA Bio, Inc. revealed that the Compensation Committee of its Board of Directors sanctioned the offering of restricted stock units comprising 3,600 shares of common stock to three recently recruited employees. This induction grant, dated December 9, 2025, falls under the Nasdaq Rule 5635(c)(4) exception and serves as a key component of each hire's compensation package. These units were awarded to entice the individuals to join TELA Bio.

data.title: 4DMT grants 13,800 RSUs to 3 new employees; part of the 2025 Employment Inducement Award Plan.
data.description: In Emeryville, California on December 12, 2025, 4D Molecular Therapeutics revealed that the compensation committee of their board of directors awarded three new non-executive employees with 13,800 Restricted Stock Units (RSUs) on December 9, 2025. These RSUs were granted under the Company's 2025 Employment Inducement Award Plan, approved in February 2025, under Rule 5635(c)(4) of The Nasdaq Global Market. 4D Molecular Therapeutics, listed as Nasdaq: FDMT, FDMT or 4DMT, is a key late-stage biotechnology firm focused on developing targeted therapeutics with the aim of revolutionizing treatment approaches and delivering significant advantages to patients.

data.title: Karbon Capital Partners Corp. completed a $345M IPO as a SPAC for future acquisitions.
data.description: On December 12, 2025, in Scranton, Pennsylvania, Karbon Capital Partners Corp. disclosed the completion of its special purpose acquisition company deal. The company was formed to merge with multiple businesses or entities, and the closing was confirmed by the officials. The specific details of the transaction were not mentioned in the announcement.

data.title: Alector appoints Neil Berkley as Chief Financial Officer & Chief Business Officer effective 12/10/2025 after serving as CBO since Mar 2024.
data.description: On December 12, 2025, in South San Francisco, California, Alector, Inc. disclosed that Neil Berkley, who has been Alector's Chief Business Officer (CBO) since March 2024 and also took on the role of Interim Chief Financial Officer (CFO) in June 2025, has now officially been appointed as CFO as of December 10, 2025. Alector, Inc., a company traded on Nasdaq under the symbol ALEC, is dedicated to developing treatments to combat the progressive effects of neurodegenerative diseases. Neil Berkley will retain his position as CBO while assuming the responsibilities of CFO.

data.title: Navios Maritime Partners L.P. in Piraeus, Greece, announces senior leadership changes. (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) Dec. 12, 2025, NYSE: NMM.
data.description: On December 12, 2025, in Piraeus, Greece, Navios Maritime Partners L.P. ("Navios Partners"), a global company owning and managing dry cargo and tanker ships, revealed significant modifications in senior leadership. This organization, listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the symbol NMM, announced these changes to the public.
